name: Polvorones"dust Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup almonds or pecans, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Add powdered sugar and salt; beat to form a light mixture.
3. Incorporate nuts and vanilla.
4. Gradually add flour, mixing thoroughly.
5. Form walnut-sized balls or crescents from the dough.
6. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 325°F for 15-20 minutes, until lightly browned on the bottom.
8. Allow to cool slightly before rolling in additional powdered sugar.
These cookies are known by various names such as butterballs and Russian teacakes. In New Mexico, they are called "polvorones," which translates to "dust balls."
